ApiKeysPage.title: API Keys
ApiKeysPage.description: Manage your API keys and view their details.

CreateApiKeyDialog.limitZero: The API key limit for this instance is set to 0, which means you cannot create any API keys. Please contact your administrator for more information.
CreateApiKeyDialog.limitExceeded: You have reached the maximum number of API keys allowed for your account. ({current}/{limit})

toast.creationSuccess: Your API key has been successfully created.
toast.creationFailed: Failed to create API key. Please try again.

dialog.successDescription: Your new API key has been successfully created. Please copy and store it securely, as it will not be shown again.
dialog.createDescription: Fill in the details below to create a new API key.

toast.apiKeyDisabled: The API key has been successfully disabled.
toast.apiKeyEnabled: The API key has been successfully enabled.
toast.apiKeyToggleFailed: Failed to update API key status. Please try again.
toast.apiKeyDeleted: The API key has been successfully deleted.
toast.apiKeyDeleteFailed: Failed to delete API key. Please try again.

empty.title: No API Keys Yet
empty.description: You haven't created any API keys yet. Click the button below to create your first API key.

input.searchPlaceholder: Search API keys by name or ID...

dialog.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the API key "{name}" (ID: {id})? This action cannot be undone.

ConnectionsPage.title: Connections
ConnectionsPage.description: Manage your connected accounts. You can connect your account to third-party services for easier sign-in.

toast.tryAgain: Please try again later or contact your administrator if the issue persists.

tooltip.notConfigured: {provider} login is not available. Please contact your administrator.

SecurityPage.title: Security
SecurityPage.description: Manage your security settings and preferences.

toast.dataExportSuccess: Data export request submitted. You will receive an email with the download link once it's ready.

card.title: Export Your Data
card.description: Request a copy of all your data stored in our system. This may take some time depending on the amount of data you have.

toast.accountDeleted: Your account has been successfully deleted.
toast.deleteFailed: Failed to delete your account. Please try again.

card.title: Delete Your Account
card.description: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Deleting your account will remove all attached data, including projects, from our system. Please be certain.

dialog.title: Are you absolutely sure?
dialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and all attached data.

toast.emailUpdated: Your email has been successfully updated.
toast.emailUpdateFailed: Failed to update your email. Please try again.
toast.passwordUpdated: Your password has been successfully updated.
toast.passwordUpdateFailed: Failed to update your password. Please try again.
toast.passwordAdded: A password has been added to your account.
toast.passwordAddFailed: Adding a password to an account is not supported yet.

editEmail.title: Edit Email
editEmail.description: Enter your new email address that you want to associate with your account.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Enter your current password and a new password to update your account password.

addPassword.title: Add Password
addPassword.description: Set a password for your account. This will allow you to log in using your email and password.

SessionsPage.title: Sessions
SessionsPage.description: Manage your active sessions and view their details.

toast.sessionsRevoked: All sessions revoked except the current one.
toast.revokeFailed: Failed to revoke sessions. Please try again.

dialog.title: Revoke Other Sessions
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to revoke all other sessions except the current one? This will log out your account from all other devices and locations.

toast.revokeFailed: Failed to revoke sessions. Please try again.

dialog.title: Revoke All Sessions
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to revoke all sessions? This will log out your account from all devices and locations, including the current one.

toast.copyFailed: Failed to copy session ID. Please try again.
toast.revokeSuccess: The session has been successfully revoked.
toast.revokeFailed: Failed to revoke session. Please try again.

tooltip.cannotRevokeCurrentSession: You can't revoke the current session from here. To revoke this session, please use the "Revoke All Sessions" option above.

PublicProfilePage.title: Public Profile
PublicProfilePage.description: View and manage your public profile information.

toast.nameUpdated: Your name has been successfully updated.
toast.nameUpdateFailed: Failed to update your name. Please try again.
toast.avatarUpdated: Your avatar has been successfully updated.
toast.avatarUpdateFailed: Failed to update your avatar. Please try again.

editName.title: Edit Name
editName.description: Enter your new name that you want to display on your profile.

editAvatar.title: Edit Avatar
editAvatar.description: Upload a new avatar image to display on your profile. Supported formats are JPEG and PNG.

customUrl.title: Custom avatar URL
customUrl.description: This profile is using a custom avatar URL. If you save a different avatar source, this URL will be replaced and you will not be able to revert to this exact URL.

none.label: None
none.description: Use a generated avatar based on your name.

gravatar.label: Gravatar
gravatar.description: Use the avatar associated with your email on Gravatar.

github.label: GitHub
github.description: Use the avatar from your linked GitHub account.

toast.copyFailed: Failed to copy user ID. Please try again.
